spec.query:
from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "db_pingMs")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> last()

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "uptimeSec")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> last()

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "counts_users")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> last()

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "counts_usersPaid")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> last()

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "counts_usersFree")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> last()

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "entitlements_activeGrantUsers")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> last()

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "cache_globalReadHitRate")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 100.0 }))

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "cache_backfillCompleteRatio")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 100.0 }))

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r["_field"] == "db_pingMs" or
      r["_field"] == "db_healthAggregationMs"
    )
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

spec.description: Trend of database ping and full health aggregation duration.

spec.description: Uptime trend; should be monotonically increasing except restarts.

spec.query:

  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)

    )

  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

      r["_field"] == "newsletter_optedOutSourceCounts_settings_page_optout"
    )
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r["_field"] == "scheduler_clipCache_lastRunDurationMs" or
      r["_field"] == "scheduler_clipCache_batchSize" or
      r["_field"] == "scheduler_clipCache_lastRunOwnerCount"
    )
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

spec.description: Scheduler duration, batch size, and owner count.
spec.title: Scheduler Performance
